question.ask: 10. Why does Amy like the robot?

info.value: Hi, I'm Amy. I have a smart cooking robot at home. It makes cooking so easy for me. I just tell it what to cook, and it gets started right away. The robot prepares meals all by itself, cutting, mixing, and cooking every time. It usually finishes its job in about half an hour. One day, when it was making beef noodles for me, my mum was surprised and said, "Wow, it smells so good!" I smiled and said, "I like it because I never get hungry again." We're happy to have such a good helper at home!
